title: VACUUM corrupts database when MAIN and TEMP table names overlap.
key_bug_features: MAIN and TEMP table names overlap during VACUUM
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE main_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value INTEGER DEFAULT 1);
INSERT INTO temp_table (name, value) VALUES ('test2', NULL);
